products incorporate Oracle MySQL Connectors. Certain MySQL Connector/J versions are susceptible to a difficult to exploit vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated attacker with network access via multiple protocols to compromise MySQL Connectors. Successful attacks require human interaction from a person other than the attacker.
